id.description: Unique ID associated with a PreIPOCompany.

linkedIn.description: The LinkedIn profile URL associated with the PreIPOCompany.

facebook.description: The Facebook profile URL of the PreIPOCompany.

country.description: Country where the PreIPOCompany is located.

address.description: PreIPOCompany’s address. This attribute will describe the company’s headquarters.

type.description: Type of entity of the PreIPOCompany.

yearEst.description: The year the PreIPOCompany was established.

numJobs.description: The number of employees at the PreIPO Company.

logoURL.description: A URL link associated with the PreIPOCompany’s logo.

totalFunding.description: PreIPOCompany total funding, expressed in USD.

lastFundingTotal.description: The total size of the last funding round, expressed in USD.

totalFundingRounds.description: PreIPOCompany total number of funding rounds.

lastFundingDate.description: The date of the PreIPOCompany’s most recent funding.

lastFundingType.description: The type (Equity or Debt) of the last funding round.

numInvestors.description: The number of investors in a PreIPOCompany. This number represents the number of institutional investors that have participated in primary fundraises.

twelveMonthTrailingRevenue.description: Revenue generated in the previous 12 months by this PreIPOCompany.

lastValuation.description: Most recent valuation of the PreIPOCompany, based on the most recent funding round. Expressed in USD.

lastSharePrice.description: The PreIPOCompany’s share price at the most recent funding round, expressed in USD.

numCustomers.description: The number of customers serviced by a Pre-IPO Company.

executiveTeam.description: Array of the PreIPOCompany’s executive or management team.

numSharesOutstanding.description: The number of shares that have been issued by the PreIPOCompany.

notableInvestorsLogos.description: A list of the notable investors’ logos associated with a PreIPOCompany.

categories.description: A list of the categories a PreIPOCompany belongs to.

referencePrice.description: The PreIPOCompany’s reference price, expressed in USD.

referencePriceDate.description: Date and time when the PreIPOCompany's reference price was last updated.

symbol.description: Unique symbol assigned to this Pre-IPO Company. Each single asset SPV associated with this Pre-IPO Company will have its own, SPV-specific symbol that leverages this symbol as its "base".

listingType.description: Defines if the company is public or private. Companies that IPO will be updated accordingly.

isActive.description: Defines if the company is active or inactive. Companies are updated to inactive if they experience a bankruptcy, shutdown, or similar corporate event.

listings.description: Includes details on the exchange, ticker, listed_at and delisted_at (if it exists).

milestones.description: Includes details on the IPO or delisting date.

id.description: Unique ID associated with an SPV.

preIPOCompanyInvestmentId.description: The unique ID of the PreIPOCompany that the SPV is investing into.

preIPOCompanyId.description: The PreIPOCompany which the SPV will be investing into.

totalDollarAllocation.description: This number describes the total amount of capital that will be raised into the SPV, including management fees, commission paid to Partners distributing the SPV, fund admin fees, and all other expenses.

minCommitmentAmount.description: The minimum amount that an Investor can invest into an SPV during a primary offering.

valuation.description: Describes the implied valuation of the associated PreIPOCompany, and it accounts for fees, commissions, markups (if any), and share price. This number is set when the SPV is created.

description.description: Longer description of the SPV’s strategy or purpose.

notableInvestors.description: A list of notable investors associated with an SPV.

holdbackAmount.description: Holdback amount associated with the SPV. Will be represented as a dollar amount.

managementFee.description: The one time, up front management fee charged by the SPV.

managementFeeYearsPayable.description: The number of years over which the management fee will be paid. SPVs offered through Monark will have this number set to 1, as the SPV will charge a one time up front management fee.

fundingDeadline.description: Funding deadline associated with the primary issuance of an SPV. Prefunded SPVs may not have a funding deadline. SPVs will no longer accept Subscriptions once the Funding Deadline has passed.

exemptionsClaimed.description: The exemptions claimed by a PreIPOCompanySPV. These align with the SEC's Form D Item 6: Federal Exemptions and Exclusions Claimed.

monarkStage.description: The stage that an SPV is in. Refer to the “SPV Status Transitions” page in our Guides for a detailed description of each stage.

tradingSymbol.description: Symbol assigned to the SPV. This symbol is created and assigned to the SPV upon its creation. See the [Symbology guide](https://api-docs.monark-markets.com/docs/symbology) for a more detailed description of how symbols are generated.

closeDate.description: The date that the SPV officially closed. This field will be populated after the close of the SPV.

spvCustodian.description: Custodian where SPV shares are held.

totalShareAllocation.description: The number of shares in the PreIPOCompany that will be held by the SPV.

totalNumberOfSeats.description: The number of shares in the PreIPOCompany that will be held by the SPV.

numberOfSeatsRemaining.description: The number of remaining LP positions in an SPV available to Investors. Each time an Investor completes a Subscription, this number decreases by one. Once this number reaches zero, the MonarkStage attribute associated with the SPV will move from “PRIMARY_FUNDRAISE” to “PRE_CLOSE_REVIEW.”

remainingDollarAllocation.description: The remaining dollar amount in a primary fundraise of an SPV. Once this number reaches zero the SPV will no longer accept new Investors on the primary market.

remainingShareAllocation.description: The remaining number of shares in a primary fundraise of an SPV. Once this number reaches zero the SPV will no longer accept new Investors on the primary market.

preFundedInventory.description: Indicates whether the SPV will be prefunded.

investorPricePerShare.description: The price per share of the PreIPOCompany, excluding fees, that an investor will pay when they invest in an SPV.

investorFeePerShare.description: The fee per share of the PreIPOCompany, that an Investor will pay when they invest in an SPV on the primary issuance. The InvestorPricePerShare plus the InvestorFeePerShare will determine the AllInPricePerShare.

allInPricePerShare.description: The total amount per share that an Investor will pay, including fees, when they invest in an SPV.

fundAdminExpense.description: The admin fee associated with this SPV, if the fund admin expense is not being paid out of the management fee. If the fund admin expense is being paid out of the management fee, leave this blank.

expenseReserve.description: The total expense reserve associated with this SPV, if the expense reserve is not being paid out of the admin expense. If the fund admin expense is being paid out of the management fee, leave this blank.

holdbackEnabled.description: Flag that describes whether the holdback expenses will be passed through to investors

documents.description: The base documents associated with the SPV (Optional).

preIPOCompanyName.description: The name of the parent company.

manager.description: The manager details of this SPV.

coManagers.description: List of Co-Managers of this SPV.

totalPendingSubscriptionDollars.description: The total number of dollars associated with pending subscriptions.

isApproved.description: Indicates whether the SPV is approved for the requesting partner.

goLiveDate.description: Estimated go live date of the SPV. If the exact go live date is not known, an estimate will be provided.

allowedFinancialInstitutions.description: List of allowed financial institution IDs for this SPV.

financialInstitutionId.description: This is the unique identifier of the Institution that the Financial Advisor is attached to.

crdNumber.description: CRD Number of the Financial Advisor.

iardNumber.description: IARD Number of the Financial Advisor.

Represents an NPM Tape D Prices Full History record (NPM/TAPED).
Contains historical Tape D price estimates with confidence intervals and comparisons to last funding rounds.
Tape D prices provide algorithmic valuation estimates based on secondary market trading data and comparable company analysis.

shareClass.description: Share class of PreIPOCompany. Can be Series A, Series B, Series C, etc.

numberOfShares.description: Estimated number of shares in the PreIPOCompany being purchased as part of this investment.

amountPaidToAcquire.description: The net amount of capital to be paid by the SPV to acquire the stock.

amountToTarget.description: The amount of capital sent to the target seller, minus any transaction fees.

pricePerShare.description: This is the estimated price per share purchased by the SPV. This is found by dividing the Amount Paid to Acquire by the number of shares.

transactionType.description: A transactionType of primary means that Monark has received an allocation in a PreIPOCompany's primary capital raise, and we are syndicating capital through an SPV to participate in the raise. transactionType of secondary means that an existing shareholder in the PreIPOCompany is looking for liquidity and Monark is interacting with the shareholder as a single LP, raising capital through the SPV and buying shares from the seller. transactionType of Tender Offer means that Monark is participating in a company sponsored share repurchase program through an SPV, helping the PreIPOCompany offer shareholders liquidity.

id.description: Unique ID associated with an SPV.

preIPOCompanyInvestmentId.description: The unique ID of the PreIPOCompany that the SPV is investing into.

preIPOCompanyId.description: The PreIPOCompany which the SPV will be investing into.

totalDollarAllocation.description: This number describes the total amount of capital that will be raised into the SPV, including management fees, commission paid to Partners distributing the SPV, fund admin fees, and all other expenses.

minCommitmentAmount.description: The minimum amount that an Investor can invest into an SPV during a primary offering.

valuation.description: Describes the implied valuation of the associated PreIPOCompany, and it accounts for fees, commissions, markups (if any), and share price. This number is set when the SPV is created.

description.description: Longer description of the SPV’s strategy or purpose.

notableInvestors.description: A list of notable investors associated with an SPV.

holdbackAmount.description: Holdback amount associated with the SPV. Will be represented as a dollar amount.

managementFee.description: The one time, up front management fee charged by the SPV.

managementFeeYearsPayable.description: The number of years over which the management fee will be paid. SPVs offered through Monark will have this number set to 1, as the SPV will charge a one time up front management fee.

fundingDeadline.description: Funding deadline associated with the primary issuance of an SPV. Prefunded SPVs may not have a funding deadline. SPVs will no longer accept Subscriptions once the Funding Deadline has passed.

exemptionsClaimed.description: The exemptions claimed by a PreIPOCompanySPV. These align with the SEC's Form D Item 6: Federal Exemptions and Exclusions Claimed.

monarkStage.description: The stage that an SPV is in. Refer to the “SPV Status Transitions” page in our Guides for a detailed description of each stage.

tradingSymbol.description: Symbol assigned to the SPV. This symbol is created and assigned to the SPV upon its creation. See the [Symbology guide](https://api-docs.monark-markets.com/docs/symbology) for a more detailed description of how symbols are generated.

closeDate.description: The date that the SPV officially closed. This field will be populated after the close of the SPV.

spvCustodian.description: Custodian where SPV shares are held.

totalShareAllocation.description: The number of shares in the PreIPOCompany that will be held by the SPV.

totalNumberOfSeats.description: The number of shares in the PreIPOCompany that will be held by the SPV.

numberOfSeatsRemaining.description: The number of remaining LP positions in an SPV available to Investors. Each time an Investor completes a Subscription, this number decreases by one. Once this number reaches zero, the MonarkStage attribute associated with the SPV will move from “PRIMARY_FUNDRAISE” to “PRE_CLOSE_REVIEW.”

remainingDollarAllocation.description: The remaining dollar amount in a primary fundraise of an SPV. Once this number reaches zero the SPV will no longer accept new Investors on the primary market.

remainingShareAllocation.description: The remaining number of shares in a primary fundraise of an SPV. Once this number reaches zero the SPV will no longer accept new Investors on the primary market.

preFundedInventory.description: Indicates whether the SPV will be prefunded.

investorPricePerShare.description: The price per share of the PreIPOCompany, excluding fees, that an investor will pay when they invest in an SPV.

investorFeePerShare.description: The fee per share of the PreIPOCompany, that an Investor will pay when they invest in an SPV on the primary issuance. The InvestorPricePerShare plus the InvestorFeePerShare will determine the AllInPricePerShare.

allInPricePerShare.description: The total amount per share that an Investor will pay, including fees, when they invest in an SPV.

fundAdminExpense.description: The admin fee associated with this SPV, if the fund admin expense is not being paid out of the management fee. If the fund admin expense is being paid out of the management fee, leave this blank.

expenseReserve.description: The total expense reserve associated with this SPV, if the expense reserve is not being paid out of the admin expense. If the fund admin expense is being paid out of the management fee, leave this blank.

holdbackEnabled.description: Flag that describes whether the holdback expenses will be passed through to investors

documents.description: The base documents associated with the SPV (Optional).

manager.description: The manager details of this SPV.

goLiveDate.description: Estimated go live date of the SPV. If the exact go live date is not known, an estimate will be provided.

initialMaximumInvestment.description: The highest amount of capital that an investor can commit while still remaining within a particular share class. This attribute might be null if there is no cap.

subsequentMinimumInvestment.description: The lowest amount of capital that an investor must commit to qualify for this particular share class, if they have already submitted a subscription.

subsequentMaximumInvestment.description: The highest amount of capital that an investor can commit while still remaining within a particular share class, if they have already submitted a subscription for this share class. This attribute might be null if there is no cap.

Unregistered implies the instrument is not 33 Act Registered.

Series is a group of shares issued each time the Fund receives new or additional subscription.
All subscriptions that occur at the same time belong to the same series.
All shareholders in the same series pay performance fee on those shares at the same time.

type.description: The type of action required to be performed by the Investor, as part of executing the Order. DocumentSign and DocumentAcknowledge can both be completed by “signing” the associated document. InvestorSubscriptionActions with a type of DocumentSign mean that the associated document, once signed, will be populated with an automatically generated signature. InvestorSubscriptionActions with a type of DocumentAcknowledge mean that the associated document, once signed, will be counted as acknowledged but are not required to be populated by a signature.

responsibleParty.description: This describes the entity responsible for acknowledging that the Action has been completed. Partners acknowledge that actions have been completed on behalf of their Investors.
